criteria.description: GLOSSARY_PACK is a first-order ArtifactKind (enum member, plural, glob).
criteria.evidence: WP01 (b6cf1eb6b): ArtifactKind.GLOSSARY_PACK="glossary_pack" + _PLURALS["glossary_pack"]="glossary_packs" + _PATTERNS glob, mirroring `directive`. tests/doctrine/test_glossary_pack_kind.py + updated exact-set assertion in test_artifact_kinds.py green.
criteria.notes: Reviewer confirmed enum wiring; squad H1 exact-set assertion updated + owned by WP01.

criteria.description: Kind is charter-activatable (in the 8-kind universe, not the {template,asset} exclusion set).
criteria.evidence: WP01: GLOSSARY_PACK NOT in _NON_AUGMENTATION_ELIGIBLE_KINDS; "glossary-pack" in CHARTER_KIND_TOKENS (derived). Classification test asserts membership.

criteria.description: DRG node NodeKind.GLOSSARY_PACK addressable as glossary_pack:<id> (underscore URN).
criteria.evidence: WP01: NodeKind.GLOSSARY_PACK + comment fence vs retiring runtime nodes. NFR-001 regression (test_glossary_pack_urn.py) proven RED-first: underscore accepted, hyphen rejected at both _URN_RE and prefix==kind.value.
criteria.notes: Non-vacuous: drives real Pydantic model + regex, two guard layers.

criteria.description: GlossaryPackRepository loads *.glossary-pack.yaml via BaseDoctrineRepository, exposed as DoctrineService.glossary_packs.
criteria.evidence: WP02 (49af4c061): GlossaryPackRepository(BaseDoctrineRepository[GlossaryPack]) glob *.glossary-pack.yaml (no re-implemented glob); DoctrineService.glossary_packs accessor via _built_in_dir("glossary_packs"). Through-service load test proves the accessor is live.

criteria.description: Pack/term schema carries every seed field (surface/definition/confidence-float/status/see_also/introduced_in_mission/synonyms_to_avoid) plus optional aliases/banned_synonyms.
criteria.evidence: WP02: GlossaryTerm carries all 9 fields, confidence: float, optional fields default None; GlossaryPack id/provenance/non-empty terms/description; duplicate-surface rejected. Model round-trip test RED-first.
criteria.notes: C-004: aliases/banned_synonyms present, inert (Mission B). see_also typed list[str]|None; WP03 flatten follow-up recorded (Mission B richer typing).

criteria.description: Built-in spec-kitty-core pack ships with the 104 canonical terms migrated zero-loss.
criteria.evidence: WP03 (48fb2dde2): spec-kitty-core.glossary-pack.yaml with 104 terms, all fields. Standing seed-driven full-key parity test (every seed term x every seed-present key), sparse see_also=1/introduced_in_mission=2/synonyms_to_avoid=3 pinned. Seed sha256 + term-count integrity guard (C-003, seed untouched).
criteria.notes: see_also list[dict]->str flatten judged textually lossless (info-preserving); parity circular-but-not-lossy; Mission-B follow-up for richer see_also typing.

criteria.description: Built-in pack is charter-activated by default (per-pack via activated_glossary_packs).
criteria.evidence: WP04 (2ae624d59 RED-first, 5925848cd wiring): _BUILTIN_ARTIFACT_KINDS += glossary_packs + activated_glossary_packs field/reader; default-on = None-default + _BUILTIN membership + root graph fragment. test_glossary_pack_activation.py: active with no manual activate + negative control.
criteria.notes: Gating fix: drg._SINGULAR_TO_PER_KIND_FIELD closes filter_graph_by_activation unknown-kind default-allow bypass; pack node genuinely gated.

criteria.description: Mirrored kind-lists updated in lockstep; three-way drift-guard protects default-on.
criteria.evidence: WP04: glossary_packs added to _ALLOWED_KINDS, _BUILTIN_ARTIFACT_KINDS, _ORG_DRG_KIND_ALIASES, plus _SINGULAR_TO_PLURAL_KIND / _CLI_KIND_TO_DRG_SINGULAR / charter drg maps. Drift-guard extended to genuine three-way (incl _BUILTIN_ARTIFACT_KINDS) + positive default-on assertion, RED-first proven empirically (reviewer checked out pre-wiring commit, guard tests failed).
criteria.notes: C-005 closed the hole the squad found (guard bound only 2 of 3 lists).

criteria.description: Activation, cascade, deactivation handle glossary-pack generically.
criteria.evidence: WP04: cascade.py untouched (generic, branches on graph reachability not kind==); activation plan/commit seam data-driven. test_glossary_pack_activation.py covers generic cascade activate/deactivate. Exhaustiveness fields added: DoctrineSelectionConfig.selected_glossary_packs + OrgCharterPolicy.required_glossary_packs.
criteria.notes: Exhaustiveness gate (test_artifact_selection_completeness) green; surfaced during WP03 impl, assigned to WP04.

criteria.evidence: WP01: derived free from the enum (no logic edit to kind_vocabulary/pack_manager); test asserts from_operator_token, CHARTER_KIND_TOKENS membership, YAML_KEY_MAP['glossary-pack']=='activated_glossary_packs'.
criteria.notes: Anchor correction: from_operator_token on enum, YAML_KEY_MAP in pack_manager (not kind_vocabulary).

criteria.description: Extractor emits glossary-pack nodes + a generated graph fragment so the built-in pack resolves as a loaded node.
criteria.evidence: WP03: new _emit_glossary_pack_nodes block in extract_artifact_edges (helper keeps complexity <=15); generated src/doctrine/glossary_pack.graph.yaml at doctrine ROOT (loader globs there non-recursively). NFR-003 resolves-as-loaded-node guard with TWO negative-control arms, proven RED by actually reverting fragment/emission.
criteria.notes: Squad blockers B1 (fragment location/generation) + B2 (source-node emission) fixed and verified; other 10 fragments byte-unchanged (idempotent regen).

criteria.description: spec-kitty doctor doctrine --json reports glossary-pack counts + health; invalid packs never healthy.
criteria.evidence: WP05 (0546856dc): MODEL (GlossaryPackHealth) + COLLECT (_collect_glossary_pack_health sources DoctrineService.glossary_packs, attached in _collect_profile_health) + RENDER (nested in to_dict, passthrough untouched). Reviewer instrumented COLLECT: --json carries {pack_count:1,term_count:104,healthy:true}. Synthetic invalid fixtures -> healthy=false, RC=1. NFR-005 <2s assertion.
criteria.notes: Squad F1: all three MODEL->COLLECT->RENDER layers wired; warning-parse acceptable for Mission A, structured skip-list is a documented follow-up.
